product_highlights: Crodamol™ ester range — excellent emolliency and conditioning for hair care
Incroquat™ conditioning agents — outstanding detangling and softness
Specialty hair care lipids for fiber repair
Sustainable bio-based hair care ingredient portfolio targeting 100% bio-based by 2030
notes: Croda International is a global specialty chemical company with a strong commitment to sustainability and natural ingredients. Their Crodamol™ ester range provides excellent emolliency and conditioning for hair care applications, while their Incroquat™ conditioning agents deliver outstanding detangling and softness. Croda's sustainability credentials are among the strongest in the industry, with a target of 100% bio-based ingredients by 2030, making them a preferred partner for premium natural hair care brands.
